functionDeclarations.name: store_memory_from_text
functionDeclarations.description: Store an important memory from the player's actions or story developments for future recall.

content.description: The text content of the memory to store.

entities.description: Important entities (people, places, objects) mentioned in the content.

functionDeclarations.name: retrieve_memories_by_entities
functionDeclarations.description: Recall memories related to a list of entities.

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return.
